requirement_topic.en: Refrigerant Controls — Ozone Protection and Synthetic Greenhouse Gas Management
requirement_topic.zh: 制冷剂管控——臭氧保护和合成温室气体管理
requirement_topic.zht: 制冷劑管控——臭氧保護和合成溫室氣體管理

summary.en: The mandatory Australian obligation for bulk HFCs and equipment charged with scheduled substances comes from the Ozone Protection and Synthetic Greenhouse Gas Management Act 1989 and supporting regulations. Importing pre-charged heat pumps containing R32, R410A, or other controlled synthetic greenhouse gases may require import licensing, reporting, and levy obligations. Low-GWP hydrocarbons such as R290 are not HFC quota substitutes but remain subject to safety, transport, and installation controls.
summary.zh: 散装HFC以及充注列明物质设备的澳大利亚强制义务来自《1989年臭氧保护和合成温室气体管理法》及配套法规。进口预充注R32、R410A或其他受控合成温室气体的热泵，可能需要进口许可、报告和征费义务。低GWP碳氢制冷剂如R290不是HFC配额替代项，但仍受安全、运输和安装管控。
summary.zht: 散裝HFC以及充注列明物質設備的澳洲強制義務來自《1989年臭氧保護和合成溫室氣體管理法》及配套法規。進口預充注R32、R410A或其他受控合成溫室氣體的熱泵，可能需要進口許可、報告和徵費義務。低GWP碳氫制冷劑如R290不是HFC配額替代項，但仍受安全、運輸和安裝管控。

standards_or_laws: Ozone Protection and Synthetic Greenhouse Gas Management Act 1989
Ozone Protection and Synthetic Greenhouse Gas Management Regulations 1995
Ozone Protection and Synthetic Greenhouse Gas (Import Levy) Act 1995

summary.en: China refrigerant documentation commonly includes SDS, refrigerant label data, pressure-system reports, and China domestic environmental compliance records. China does not issue Australian Ozone/SGG import licences or satisfy Australian pre-charged equipment reporting for the importer.
summary.zh: 中国制冷剂文件通常包括SDS、制冷剂标识数据、压力系统报告和中国国内环境合规记录。中国不会签发澳大利亚臭氧/合成温室气体进口许可，也不能替澳大利亚进口商履行预充注设备报告义务。
summary.zht: 中國制冷劑文件通常包括SDS、制冷劑標識資料、壓力系統報告和中國國內環境合規記錄。中國不會簽發澳洲臭氧/合成溫室氣體進口許可，也不能替澳洲進口商履行預充注設備報告義務。

standards_or_laws: China hazardous chemicals and environmental controls

gap.en: The Australian importer must identify refrigerant type and charge, confirm whether the substance is controlled, and obtain any required licence, quota, reporting, and levy arrangements before import. R410A and R32 raise Ozone/SGG import-control questions; R290 shifts the issue toward flammability and installation safety.
gap.zh: 澳大利亚进口商必须识别制冷剂类型和充注量，确认该物质是否受控，并在进口前取得所需许可、配额、报告和征费安排。R410A和R32涉及臭氧/合成温室气体进口管控问题；R290则将重点转向可燃性和安装安全。
gap.zht: 澳洲進口商必須識別制冷劑類型和充注量，確認該物質是否受控，並在進口前取得所需許可、配額、報告和徵費安排。R410A和R32涉及臭氧/合成溫室氣體進口管控問題；R290則將重點轉向可燃性和安裝安全。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory legal obligation under Ozone Protection and Synthetic Greenhouse Gas Management legislation where controlled refrigerants or pre-charged equipment are imported
mandatory_status.cn: Product and substance controls apply domestically, but they do not satisfy Australian import licensing

compliance_verdict.en: Major gap — refrigerant-charged heat pumps need Australian importer-level Ozone/SGG checks before shipment; Chinese SDS and labels are not enough.
compliance_verdict.zh: 重大差距——充注制冷剂的热泵在出货前需要澳大利亚进口商层面的臭氧/合成温室气体核查；中国SDS和标签不足。
compliance_verdict.zht: 重大差距——充注制冷劑的熱泵在出貨前需要澳洲進口商層面的臭氧/合成溫室氣體核查；中國SDS和標籤不足。

requirement_topic.en: R290 and R32 Flammability — Appliance Safety and Installation Controls
requirement_topic.zh: R290和R32可燃性——电器安全和安装管控
requirement_topic.zht: R290和R32可燃性——電器安全和安裝管控

summary.en: Australia does not treat AS/NZS 60335.2.40 as an independent statute; the mandatory obligation is electrical safety compliance through EESS and participating-jurisdiction law, with AS/NZS 60335.2.40 used as the relevant safety standard for heat pumps, air conditioners, and dehumidifiers. R32 is A2L mildly flammable and R290 is A3 highly flammable, so charge limits, airflow, leak-risk controls, ignition-source controls, markings, installation instructions, and service instructions must be assessed under the applicable AS/NZS 60335.2.40 edition and EESS evidence rules.
summary.zh: 澳大利亚并不将AS/NZS 60335.2.40视为独立法规；强制性义务是通过EESS和参与辖区法律实现电气安全合规，AS/NZS 60335.2.40则作为热泵、空调和除湿机的相关安全标准使用。R32为A2L轻度可燃，R290为A3高度可燃，因此充注量限制、气流、泄漏风险控制、点火源控制、标识、安装说明和维修说明必须按适用版本AS/NZS 60335.2.40和EESS证据规则评估。
summary.zht: 澳洲並不將AS/NZS 60335.2.40視為獨立法規；強制性義務是通過EESS和參與轄區法律實現電氣安全合規，AS/NZS 60335.2.40則作為熱泵、空調和除濕機的相關安全標準使用。R32為A2L輕度可燃，R290為A3高度可燃，因此充注量限制、氣流、洩漏風險控制、點火源控制、標識、安裝說明和維修說明必須按適用版本AS/NZS 60335.2.40和EESS證據規則評估。

summary.en: Chinese flammable-refrigerant evidence may rely on GB 4706.32, GB 9237, GB/T 7778, SDS, and factory risk assessments. Those documents may not reflect Australian national deviations, EESS evidence expectations, or local installation rules for A2L/A3 refrigerants.
summary.zh: 中国可燃制冷剂证据可能依据GB 4706.32、GB 9237、GB/T 7778、SDS和工厂风险评估。这些文件可能未反映澳新国家差异、EESS证据预期或A2L/A3制冷剂的本地安装规则。
summary.zht: 中國可燃制冷劑證據可能依據GB 4706.32、GB 9237、GB/T 7778、SDS和工廠風險評估。這些文件可能未反映澳紐國家差異、EESS證據預期或A2L/A3制冷劑的本地安裝規則。

gap.en: R290 products often require more restrictive charge, room-size, ventilation, ignition-source, transport, storage, and service controls than R32 products. Importers should confirm that labels, manuals, wiring protection, enclosure design, and installation limitations match Australian safety evidence before RCM marking.
gap.zh: R290产品通常比R32产品需要更严格的充注量、房间面积、通风、点火源、运输、储存和维修控制。进口商应在加贴RCM前确认标签、说明书、布线保护、外壳设计和安装限制与澳大利亚安全证据一致。
gap.zht: R290產品通常比R32產品需要更嚴格的充注量、房間面積、通風、點火源、運輸、儲存和維修控制。進口商應在加貼RCM前確認標籤、說明書、佈線保護、外殼設計和安裝限制與澳洲安全證據一致。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory legal obligation: EESS and participating-jurisdiction electrical safety law; AS/NZS 60335.2.40 and refrigeration installation standards are relevant compliance routes and evidence bases
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory CCC/safety controls where in scope for China domestic supply

compliance_verdict.en: Major gap for R290 and moderate-to-major gap for R32 — Australian safety evidence must address flammable-refrigerant hazards before EESS/RCM supply.
compliance_verdict.zh: R290存在重大差距，R32存在中到重大差距——澳大利亚安全证据必须在EESS/RCM供应前覆盖可燃制冷剂危险。
compliance_verdict.zht: R290存在重大差距，R32存在中到重大差距——澳洲安全證據必須在EESS/RCM供應前覆蓋可燃制冷劑危險。
